mapper.select: SELECT SSN, CUST_NO, MBLPHN_NO, USER_NM, CMPND_CHECK_KEY, SRC_NEW_USER_FLG, NEW_USER_FLG, SRC_DEL_OBJ_FLG, DEL_OBJ_FLG, INIT_CNNCTN_DT, LST_CNNCTN_DT FROM NF_CUST_MGT WHERE SSN = #{ssn} WITH UR
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NF_CUST_MGT ( SSN, CUST_NO, MBLPHN_NO, USER_NM, CMPND_CHECK_KEY, SRC_NEW_USER_FLG, NEW_USER_FLG, SRC_DEL_OBJ_FLG, DEL_OBJ_FLG, INIT_CNNCTN_DT, LST_CNNCTN_DT ) VALUES ( #{ssn}, NEXTVAL FOR NF_CUST_MGT_CUST_NO_SQ, #{mblphnNo}, #{userNm}, #{cmpndCheckKey}, #{srcNewUserFlg}, #{newUserFlg}, #{srcDelObjFlg}, #{delObjFlg}, CURRENT TIMESTAMP, CURRENT TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE NF_CUST_MGT SET LST_CNNCTN_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP, MBLPHN_NO = #{mblphnNo}, USER_NM = #{userNm}, CMPND_CHECK_KEY = #{cmpndCheckKey}, SRC_NEW_USER_FLG = #{srcNewUserFlg}, NEW_USER_FLG = #{newUserFlg}, SRC_DEL_OBJ_FLG = #{srcDelObjFlg}, DEL_OBJ_FLG = #{delObjFlg} WHERE SSN = #{ssn}
